## Related Issues

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, dependency updates

## Component(s) Affected

<!-- List affected components, e.g. hal_servo, anim_service, ws_client -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without warnings (`idf.py build`)
- [ ] `clang-format` passes (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] New component includes `idf_component.yml`, `Kconfig`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] All public APIs have Doxygen comments in `include/`
- [ ] New configurable values exposed via Kconfig (no hardcoded values)
- [ ] `test_apps/` updated with Unity tests for new logic
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Layer dependency rules respected (see `docs/architecture.md`)
